title: Read NPR's annotated fact check of President Trump's State of the Union
description: As President Trump delivers his State of the Union address, reporters from across NPR's newsroom will fact check his speech and offer context.
content: As President Trump delivers his State of the Union address, reporters from across NPR's newsroom will fact check his speech and offer context.
